The '''uro-ik v'alh''' was a massive, oblong [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]].

==Characteristics==
It was 2,240 meters on average, and armed with 80 [[Yaret-Kor|yaret-kor]] as well as hundreds of [[dovin basal]]s. It had a crew requirement of 1,640 [[Warrior caste|warriors]], and could carry 3,150 troops and 16,480 metric tons of cargo.

It could dock [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]], and had several docking arms for that task. Like the rest of the Yuuzhan Vong's technology, the Uro-ik v'alh was an organic ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
